# Guard Brasil API
> Brazilian PII detection, LGPD compliance, and cryptographic audit trail for AI pipelines.

Guard Brasil detects 15+ Brazilian PII patterns (CPF, CNPJ, RG, CNH, CEP, email, phone,
judicial records, MASP, NIS/PIS, SUS card, voter ID) and returns masked output plus a
cryptographic inspection receipt (SHA256 hash chain) for LGPD audit compliance.

## Quick Start

npm: `npm install @egosbr/guard-brasil`

```typescript
import { guard } from '@egosbr/guard-brasil'
const result = guard.inspect("CPF: 123.456.789-00, email: joao@empresa.com")
// result.safe → false
// result.output → "CPF: [CPF REMOVIDO], email: [EMAIL REMOVIDO]"
// result.receipt.inspectionHash → "sha256:..."
```

## REST API

Base URL: https://guard.egos.ia.br

### GET /v1/meta — API capabilities + pricing (no auth)
### POST /v1/inspect — PII detection + masking + receipt (Bearer token)
### POST /v1/keys — Free API key (no credit card)

## MCP (Model Context Protocol)

Tools: guard_inspect, guard_scan_pii, guard_check_safe
Config: { "guard-brasil": { "command": "npx", "args": ["@egosbr/guard-brasil", "--mcp"] } }

## Pricing (Usage-Based)

Free: 500 calls/month at R$0 | Developer: 5k at R$0.010/call | Startup: 50k at R$0.007/call
Business: 500k at R$0.004/call | Enterprise: unlimited at R$0.002/call

## PII Patterns (15 total)

CPF, CNPJ, RG, CNH, MASP, REDS, Processo Judicial, Placa Veicular,
Telefone, Email, Cartão SUS, Título Eleitor, NIS/PIS, CEP

## Links

- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@egosbr/guard-brasil
- Docs: https://guard.egos.ia.br/docs
- Health: https://guard.egos.ia.br/health
